item.title: Her Parents Watched Her Rot on the Couch for 12 Years
item.description:
Lacey Fletcher, 36, was found dead in January 2022 inside her home in Slaughter, Louisiana. Authorities discovered she had been left on a couch for years without proper care, leading to severe medical neglect.
Investigators said Fletcher had experienced a decline in her health and became unable to leave the home. Despite this, her parents failed to seek medical assistance, and evidence showed she remained in the same position for an extended period.
Her death was ruled a homicide caused by neglect. In 2024, her parents, Sheila and Clay Fletcher, pleaded no contest to manslaughter and were sentenced to prison, bringing national attention to the case.

media:content.media:title: Her Parents Watched Her Rot on the Couch for 12 Years
media:content.media:description:
Lacey Fletcher, 36, was found dead in January 2022 inside her home in Slaughter, Louisiana. Authorities discovered she had been left on a couch for years without proper care, leading to severe medical neglect.
Investigators said Fletcher had experienced a decline in her health and became unable to leave the home. Despite this, her parents failed to seek medical assistance, and evidence showed she remained in the same position for an extended period.
Her death was ruled a homicide caused by neglect. In 2024, her parents, Sheila and Clay Fletcher, pleaded no contest to manslaughter and were sentenced to prison, bringing national attention to the case.
